text.title: QA Test Strategy Template Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the qa-test-strategy-template methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: draft-risks
step.action: Number ≥3 risks with severity from rubric.

step.name: map-to-layers
step.action: Pick layers per risk; assign owners.

step.name: compress-to-1-page
step.action: Synthesise into a single page (~1000 words).
